title: euryomyrtus diffusa
intro: Euryomyrtus diffusa, also known as Lemon Myrtle, is a native Australian plant belonging to the myrtle family (Myrtaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Euryomyrtus diffusa include its potential to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and provide antimicrobial protection against infections. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or used as a spice in cooking, with its leaves being a key ingredient in its various herbal preparations.
